name: Greek Marinated Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Drained thawed frozen artichoke hearts
1 cup Small mushroom caps, cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Place eggplant and bell pepper on a baking sheet, 3 inches from the heat source. Turn frequently until charred all sides; transfer to a brown paper bag and let stand until cool enough to handle, about 15-20 minutes.
2. Peel and dice the eggplant; add to a medium bowl.
3. Peel the pepper; remove stem end and seeds. Cut into thin strips and add to the eggplant.
4. Add artichoke hearts to the bowl and set aside.
5. Spray a 9-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms, stirring occasionally until just cooked through, about 1-2 minutes. Add to the vegetable mixture.
6. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients; mix well. Pour over vegetable mixture and toss to coat.
7. Cover and let marinate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
